items.title: EC archives of the week (12-18/07): Brussels European Council (12-13/07/1976, 50 years ago) Birth Simone Veil (13/07/1927, 99 years ago) France National Day (14/07) Terrorist attack in Nice (14/07/2016, 10 years ago) 11th Asia/Europe Meeting (ASEM11), Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia (14-16/07/2016, 10 years ago) European floods (14/07/2021, 5 years ago) World Youth Skills Day 2026 “Skills for a shared future” (15/07) Visit of Ursula von der Leyen, President of the European Commission, to Ireland to present the Commission’s assessment of the national recovery plan under NextGenerationEU (16/07/2021, 5 years ago) Election of Simone Veil as President of the EP (17/07/1979, 47 years ago) Nelson Mandela International Day (18/07)
